_comment: Real Dossier IDs only. 'menu-display' and 'booking-cta' are soft Dossiers introduced together with this Scaffold. 'mailto-contact-form' is the soft fallback for the contact capability when the operator has not wired a third-party form provider. Sections like 'hero', 'menu-preview', 'hours-location' are declared in sections.json and must not appear here. See ADR 0012 for the Dossier vs Section distinction.

conditional.when: the venue explicitly wants a playable game element (kids' area, retro arcade theme)
